# Santorini Imperial — Transfers & Tours

> Santorini Imperial is a local, family-run company offering premium private transfers and tours across Santorini, Greece. Services include airport (JTR) and Athinios port transfers, hotel transfers, wedding transfers and private island tours, with a Mercedes-Benz fleet, licensed English-speaking drivers, fixed prices, meet-and-greet arrivals and 24/7 availability.

## Key facts

- Location: Santorini, Greece (serving the whole island — Fira, Oia, Imerovigli, Kamari, Perissa, Akrotiri, Athinios port, Santorini Airport JTR)
- Fleet: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (up to 3 passengers), V-Class (up to 7), Sprinter 12-seat and Sprinter 20-seat — all climate-controlled, insured
- Pricing: fixed, quoted up front — no meter, no surge pricing, no hidden fees
- Availability: 24/7, every day of the year including public holidays
- Arrivals: meet-and-greet with name sign, real-time flight and ferry tracking, free reasonable wait time
- Payment: all major credit/debit cards, bank transfer, cash
- Languages: English, Greek, German, French, Italian
- Phone / WhatsApp / Viber: +30 6940 355016
- Email: imperialsantorini@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/santorini_imperial

## Main pages

- [Home](https://imperialsantorini.com/): Overview of Santorini transfers, tours and premium services.
- [Transfers](https://imperialsantorini.com/transfers/): Airport, port, hotel-to-hotel, wedding, beach/evening and 24-hour driver transfers, with a transfers FAQ.
- [Tours](https://imperialsantorini.com/tours/): Private Santorini tours — wine tasting, sightseeing, full-day island tours and custom build-your-own routes.
- [Fleet](https://imperialsantorini.com/fleet/): The Mercedes-Benz vehicles, capacities and luggage details.
- [Gallery](https://imperialsantorini.com/gallery/): Photos of the fleet, interiors and Santorini caldera views.
- [About](https://imperialsantorini.com/about/): Who we are — a local, family-run team with 12+ years of experience.
- [Contact](https://imperialsantorini.com/contact/): Phone, WhatsApp, email and location.
- [Online Booking](https://imperialsantorini.com/book/): Book a transfer or tour online with confirmation within the hour.
- [Blog](https://imperialsantorini.com/blog/): Travel tips and guides for visiting Santorini.

## Services

- Santorini Airport (JTR) transfers — meet-and-greet, luggage help, flight tracking
- Athinios port / cruise transfers — driver waits portside with a sign
- Hotel-to-hotel transfers within Santorini
- Wedding transfers and group bookings
- Beach, evening and late-night transfers
- 24-hour private driver and dedicated Mercedes
- Private tours: wine experience, sightseeing, full-day island tour, custom itineraries

## Common questions

- How much does a Santorini airport transfer cost? Every transfer is fixed-price and quoted up front based on destination and group size — no meter, no surge.
- How long does the transfer from Santorini Airport (JTR) take? Typically 15–30 minutes; Fira ~15 min, Oia ~30 min, Athinios port ~20–25 min.
- Do you offer meet-and-greet? Yes — the driver waits with a name sign at arrivals or portside and helps with luggage.
- Do you track delayed flights/ferries? Yes, in real time, with no charge for reasonable delays.
- Are child seats available? Yes, free of charge on request.
- How do I book? Online booking form, email, or WhatsApp — confirmation within the hour during the day.

## Languages

The site is available in English (/), Greek (/el/), German (/de/), French (/fr/) and Italian (/it/).

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp / Viber: +30 6940 355016
- Email: imperialsantorini@gmail.com
